sections.short-biography: Held in esteem due to his father but Dong Zhao got him, and his esteemed friends, sacked.

full_text:
Liu Xi
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Xi. Held in esteem due to his father but Dong Zhao got him, and his esteemed friends, sacked. Liu Xi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
